creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to nbari from comment #11)
~/FreeBSD-repos/ports$ fetch "https://bz-attachments.freebsd.org/attachment.cgi?id=244342" -o gbump.patch
fetch: https://bz-attachments.freebsd.org/attachment.cgi?id=244342: size of remote file is not known
gbump.patch                                             17 kB  116 MBps    00s
~/FreeBSD-repos/ports$ patch -p1 < gbump.patch 
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff --git a/devel/gbump/Makefile b/devel/gbump/Makefile
|index eb5da0ca48e5..1d0a5d522f73 100644
|--- a/devel/gbump/Makefile
|+++ b/devel/gbump/Makefile
--------------------------
Patching file devel/gbump/Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 14.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff --git a/devel/gbump/distinfo b/devel/gbump/distinfo
|index ba0bbd56b8d2..01e44aad4154 100644
|--- a/devel/gbump/distinfo
|+++ b/devel/gbump/distinfo
--------------------------
Patching file devel/gbump/distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff --git a/devel/gbump/files/patch-powerpc b/devel/gbump/files/patch-powerpc
|index b075cabe5395..7a549c6d5bd6 100644
|--- a/devel/gbump/files/patch-powerpc
|+++ b/devel/gbump/files/patch-powerpc
--------------------------
Patching file devel/gbump/files/patch-powerpc using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
done

Make sure your tree is clean before applying the patch.
